p.strong: Reading Compiler Output — Instruction by Instruction

text.tspan: // Loads 4 floats from array 'a' into xmm1
// Loads 4 floats from array 'a' into xmm1
// Swap low pair [0,1] with high pair [2,3]
// Swap low pair [0,1] with high pair [2,3]
// High 64 bits of src -> Low 64 bits of dest
// High 64 bits of src -> Low 64 bits of dest

div.p:
8 FP ops/cycle peak (with FMA)
2 Load/cycle (32 bytes/cycle)
Bottleneck: Memory bandwidth
Compiler uses movups for safety. Aligned loads (movaps) require 16-byte alignment of input arrays.
Uses shufps+addps+movhlps instead of haddps. haddps is 2-3x higher latency on older architectures.
xmm0 accumulator creates a 4-cycle loop dependency. Unrolling by 4x would allow better port utilization.
